creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
This is fixed and ready to closed based off the PHP changelog.

http://php.net/ChangeLog-5.php#5.6.11
PHP 5 ChangeLog
Version 5.6.11
10 Jul 2015
SPL:
Fixed bug #69737 (Segfault when SplMinHeap::compare produces fatal error).

Note that upstream removed the "security" tag from the upstream bug tracker.
